nasb.text: They came to Capernaum; and when He was in the house, He began to question them, “What were you discussing on the way?”

esv.text: And they came to Capernaum. And when he was in the house he asked them, “What were you discussing on the way?”

cnv.text: 他們來到迦百農。在屋裡的時候，耶穌問他們：“你們在路上爭論甚麼？”

ccb.text: 他们回到迦百农的住所，耶稣问门徒：“你们一路上争论些什么？”

csbs.text: 他们来到了迦百农，进了屋子，耶稣问门徒们：“你们在路上讨论什么呢？”
